verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All alone with strange people, I try to be myself, Knowing it's not where I ought to be; Why do I keep searching for treasures somewhere else, When what I have means all this world to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And all the treasures of this world, All its diamonds and its pearls Could not compare with the Truth He's let me see; And just to know I'm one of them, To be in His chosen kin, I know that's the greatest treasure, That's the greatest treasure, That's the greatest treasure to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We were one in a million, chosen out to be His Bride, Unveiled all of Christ for me and you; All the money just can't purchase, What He's placed down deep inside, This treasure's just too good to be true.
